reviews.comment:
Un punto justo para bajar estirar las piernas y recargar agua para los mates, y si tenes mascota es ideal para que caminen y hagan sus necesidades, llevar bolsita y tirar en el tacho las eses

(Translated by Google)
A perfect spot to stretch your legs and refill your water bottle for mate, and if you have a pet it's ideal for them to walk around and do their business; just bring a bag and throw away their waste in the bin.
